/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc  -fvisibility=hidden  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/wxwidgets/lib CMakeFiles/fuzz_main.dir/fuzz_main.c.o CMakeFiles/fuzz_main.dir/cjson_read_fuzzer.c.o -o fuzz_main  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/simonvesely/Neovim/C/Quiz/cjson/build ../libcjson.1.7.17.dylib -lm
